hero.title: WanderMood
hero.tagline: Plan your perfect day based on your mood. Personalized plans that adapt to the weather and your preferences.

appPreview.title: See what you get
appPreview.subtitle: Already explored the world with our app.

pickMood.label: Pick your mood
pickMood.description: Choose how you feel and get a plan that fits.

myDay.label: My Day
myDay.description: Your timeline: right now, up next, done.

wanderFeed.label: WanderFeed

experience.title: Travel that matches your energy.
experience.intro: Moody helps you plan your day around how you feel — one tap, and your vibe becomes your plan. Plans adapt to the weather. Filter by diet, accessibility, and what you're in the mood for.

pickMood.title: Pick your mood
pickMood.line: One tap. Get a personalized plan that fits your vibe.

getYourDay.title: Get your day
getYourDay.line: Right now, up next, done — and it adapts to the weather.

wanderFeed.title: WanderFeed
wanderFeed.line: See what others explore and share yours.

advancedFilters.title: Advanced filters
advancedFilters.line: Diet, accessibility, photo spots & more — find exactly what you're looking for.

moodMatch.title: Mood Match Score
moodMatch.line: See your match percentage for each plan so you instantly know what fits your vibe best.

moods.title: How do you want to feel today?
moods.subtitle: Pick one or more — we'll shape your day around it.

howItWorks.title: Your day, in three steps
howItWorks.subtitle: From mood to plan in seconds.

steps.step2Subtitle: A plan that matches your energy and the weather.

cta.title: Let's go make memories.
cta.subtitle: Get the app and plan your perfect day — mood, weather, and filters included.

privacyPage.title: Privacy Policy
privacyPage.intro: We respect your privacy and only collect what is needed to improve your travel planning experience.
privacyPage.item1: Account data is used to personalize your mood-based plans.
privacyPage.item2: We do not sell your personal data to third parties.
privacyPage.item3: You can request deletion of your account data at any time.

termsPage.title: Terms of Use
termsPage.intro: By using WanderMood, you agree to the following terms:
termsPage.item1: Use the app responsibly and follow local laws while traveling.
termsPage.item2: Content you share must not violate rights of others.
termsPage.item3: We may update features and terms as the product evolves.

contactPage.title: Contact us
contactPage.subtitle: Need help or want to partner with WanderMood? Send us a message.
contactPage.note: This opens your email app and sends to hello@wandermood.com.
